tagline: Flexible workspaces for builders, freelancers, and growing teams.

hours.holidays: Closed on public holidays unless otherwise announced

location: 12 Harbour Lane, Floor 3, Mumbai 400001. Nearest metro: CST (5 min walk).

plans.name: Hot Desk
plans.best_for: Freelancers and remote workers who need occasional workspace

plans.name: Dedicated Desk
plans.best_for: Professionals who need a consistent daily workspace

plans.name: Private Cabin
plans.best_for: Small teams or businesses needing privacy

amenities: 24/7 CCTV and keycard access (Dedicated and Cabin members)
Pantry with unlimited tea, coffee, and filtered water
Phone booths for private calls (free, bookable via app)

booking.hot_desk: Walk-in or book via website/WhatsApp. Payment upfront.
booking.dedicated_and_cabin: Fill inquiry form on website. Team will respond within 4 business hours.
booking.meeting_rooms: Book via app or WhatsApp. Minimum 1-hour booking.
booking.trial: Free half-day trial available for Dedicated Desk and Cabin plans on weekdays.

cancellation_policy.monthly_plans: 30-day written notice required to cancel monthly plans. No mid-month refunds.
cancellation_policy.meeting_rooms: Free cancellation up to 2 hours before. 50% charge within 2 hours.

guest_policy: Hot Desk and Dedicated members can bring 1 guest per day at no charge. Additional guests are ₹200/person/day.
discounts_policy: We don't offer published student discounts. Customers must connect with hello@nexhub.in for special queries.
business_registration_policy: Virtual office and business address registration services are available. Inquiries must be sent to hello@nexhub.in.
